title: Implement QuadraticExt<F> with Karatsuba multiplication
description: Core type: struct QuadraticExt<F> { c0: F, c1: F }. Implement FiniteField trait. Karatsuba multiplication: 3 base-field muls instead of 4. Implement ConstField when F: ConstField + Copy. Location: crates/gf2-core/src/gfpn/tower.rs. Must pass axiom test harness (2248b17d).
